creator: dodo2998@gmail.com
text:
The "GUI" of the installation process of FreeBSD freezes a lot, and this can be resolved by pressing any key on the keyboard.

My hardware:

* Intel i7 processor (I don't know which)
* Nvidia graphics card (GTX 960)
* MSI motherboard (I don't know which)

I was running the installer from the -disk1.iso.
